package badhandler

import (
	"fmt"

	errs "github.com/Project-Builder-Schematics/project-builder-cli/internal/shared/errors"
)

// VIOLATION: uses %v in an errs.Error Message field, which can leak
// structured data (wrapped error causes, stack traces, internal paths).
// The fitness script (FF-09) negative-greps Message:.*%[v+] in handler files.
func RunE(someErr error) error {
	return &errs.Error{
		Code:    errs.ErrCodeNotImplemented,
		Op:      "bad.handler",
		Message: fmt.Sprintf("operation failed: %v", someErr),
	}
}
